basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research (IISER) Pune
basic_details.short_information: IISER Pune is recruiting 1 Project Associate-I post with M.Sc./B.Tech qualification under the project “Uncovering Mechanisms For Metabolic Serine Hydrolases in Host Defense”.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application.
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. / B.Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry with minimum 70% marks or equivalent grade.

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only. No other mode of application will be accepted.
Visit the official application link given on the IISER Pune website below this advertisement.
Click on “Project Associate-I - Click here to apply”.
Fill the online application form with all required details.
Upload necessary documents (CV, photo, educational certificates, etc.).
Submit the form before the deadline.
After submission, take a printout for future reference. No hard copy needs to be sent.
important_instructions: Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email only. List will also be displayed on the institute website. Bring original documents and self-attested photocopies at the time of selection process. This is a purely temporary and contractual position. No claim for regular appointment/absorption. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IISER Pune is recruiting 1 Project Associate-I post with M.Sc./B.Tech qualification under the project “Uncovering Mechanisms For Metabolic Serine Hydrolases in Host Defense”.

rows.indian_institute_of_science_education_an: “Uncovering Mechanisms For Metabolic Serine Hydrolases in Host Defense”
Rs. 30,000 + 30% HRA Rs. 37,000 + 30% HRA (with valid CSIR-NET/GATE/DBT-JRF etc.)

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the last date of application.

rows.details: M.Sc. / B.Tech in Life sciences / Biotechnology / Bioengineering / Chemistry with minimum 70% marks or equivalent grade.

1. Work experience or MS project in Drosophila genetics or genomics laboratory. 2. Candidates who have qualified National exams (CSIR-NET, DBT-NET, GATE, JGEEBILS). 3. Basic degree in Biochemistry or Genetics.
Not more than 30 years (relaxation as per rules).

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: The incumbent is expected to: Conduct research on Serine Hydrolases in Drosophila. Assist in management of the project.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates shall apply online only. No other mode of application will be accepted. Step-by-Step Application Process: Last Date: 10 July 2026

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email only. List will also be displayed on the institute website. Bring original documents and self-attested photocopies at the time of selection process. This is a purely temporary and contractual position. No claim for regular appointment/absorption. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: IISER Pune Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 Important Information
content_sections.text: Appointment is purely temporary and will end automatically on project completion. Number of posts may vary as per requirement. For updates, visit the IISER Pune website regularly.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application is 10 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Project Associate-I at IISER Pune?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy under Advertisement No. 48/2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for IISER Pune Project Associate-I 2026?
faq.answer: Rs. 30,000 + 30% HRA (without national exam) and Rs. 37,000 + 30% HRA for candidates with valid CSIR-NET/GATE/DBT-JRF etc.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for IISER Pune Project Associate post?
faq.answer: M.Sc. or B.Tech in Life Sciences, Biotechnology, Bioengineering, or Chemistry with minimum 70% marks.

faq.question: Q5. Is NET/GATE mandatory for IISER Pune Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: No, it is not mandatory but preferred and gives higher emoluments.

faq.question: Q6. What is the project title for IISER Pune Advertisement 48/2026?
faq.answer: “Uncovering Mechanisms For Metabolic Serine Hydrolases in Host Defense”.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for IISER Pune Project Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: Not more than 30 years as on the last date of application (with possible relaxation).

faq.question: Q9. How to apply for IISER Pune Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: Apply online through the link provided on the official IISER Pune website before 10-07-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Is the IISER Pune Project Associate position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual for 1 year (extendable based on performance and project continuation).
